title: Nero
description: Nero is a modpack based on another modpack called Simply Optimized and it has several mods that help to a better multiplayer experience.
body:
# Nero is an edit of the popular modpack called [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).

Nero is a modpack based on another modpack called [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and it has several mods that help to a better multiplayer experience, like Essential, a mod with a lot of multiplayer functionalities, like being able to create a server very easily, a cosmetic system and more.

![MODLIST IMAGE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/dGeJCZjm/images/53537cc93765e2da8e76bec468f3c6470c87ab46.png)

* [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) **by 2No2Name & jellysquid3**
* [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) **by ishland & duplexsystem**
* [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/version/1.1.12+1.19.4) **by RaphiMC**
* [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling/version/v0.17.0-1.19.4) **by fxmorin**
* [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric/version/1.19.4-1.7.0) **by UltimateBoomer & fantahund**
* [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium/version/1.0.3-1.19.4) **by tr7zw**
* [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric/version/0.2.0+beta.7.73+1.19.4) **by ishland**
* [MemoryLeakFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix/version/v1.0.0) **by fxmorin & KingContaria**
* [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/5.2.0-fabric) **by malte0811**
* [Kypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton/version/0.2.2) **by astei**
* [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/version/1.6.2-1.19.4) **by tr7zw**
* [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.19.4-0.4.10) **by burgerguy, IMS212 & jellysquid3**
* [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports/version/Fabric-1.19.4-v2.1.2) **by Aizistral & robotkoer**
* [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight/version/1.1.1+1.19) **by spottedleaf**
* [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.81.1+1.19.4) **by modmuss50 & sfPlayer1**
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/10.0.96+fabric) **by shedaniel**
* [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/2.3.0+1.19.4) **by LambdAurora**
* [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality/version/0.7.0) **by PinkGoosik**
* [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads/version/0.10.14) **by Fourmisain & dzwdz**
* [Cosmetica](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica/version/1.2.4-1.19.4) **by eyezahhhh & valoeghese**
* [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/13.1.0.11) **by mezz**
* [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl/version/2.5.1+1.19.4-fabric) **by isxander**
* [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation/version/1.9.3) **by theoness1 & PinkGoosik**
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/6.2.2) **by Prospector, jackassmc, NeusFear & modmuss50**
* [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify/version/2.9.4) **by isxander**
* [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.9.4+kotlin.1.8.21) **by modmuss50 & sfPlayer1**
* [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential/version/1.0.0) **by SparkUniverse**
* [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols/version/1.8.1+1.19.4) **by Motschen & LambdAura**
* [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.10) **by MehVahdJukaar**

**This modpack does not seek to steal credits or take ownership of any mod or modpack, it was made just for fun and to add other useful mods to the aforementioned Simply Optimized modpack. Full credits to the respective creators of the mods used in this modpack and to [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop) for creating such a powerful modpack.**
